common.unknown_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.forbidden: You don't have permission for this.
common.validation: Check your input and try again.
common.rate_limited: Too many requests — slow down for a moment.
common.upstream_error: Upstream service is having a bad time. Try again in a minute.

session.expired: This session expired before you submitted.

plan.not_found: No plan has been generated for today yet.

activity.not_found: That activity isn't part of today's plan.

token.invalid: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

user.not_registered: We couldn't find an account linked to this sign-in.
user.exists: An account already exists for this sign-in.

link_code.not_found: Link code not found. Run /link on the bot for a new one.
link_code.expired: Link code has expired. Request a new one from the bot.

link.conflict: This account is already linked to a different user.

local.email_exists: An account with this email already exists. Sign in instead.
local.username_taken: This username is taken — try another.
local.too_many_attempts: Too many failed attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
local.token_invalid: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
local.weak_password: Password must be at least 8 characters and contain a letter and a number.

text.too_short: Essay must be at least {min_words} words (got {got}).

scoring.failed: The scoring service returned invalid data. Please try again.

exam_date.invalid: Exam date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format.

team.seat_limit_reached: Team is at its seat limit ({seat_limit}).
team.member_already_exists: User is already a member of this team.
team.not_member: User is not a member of this team.

ai.rate_limited: The AI service is busy right now. Try again in a moment.
ai.provider_unavailable: AI service is currently unavailable. Please try again.

quota.daily_exceeded: You've used {used} of {plan_quota} AI calls today on this plan. Resets at midnight UTC.

daily_words_count.out_of_range: Daily words must be between 5 and 50.

vocab.word_empty: Enter a word or short phrase.
vocab.daily_not_found: Generate today's vocabulary before adding extra words.
vocab.extra_limit_exceeded: You've used all {limit} extra words for today. Resets at {next_reset_at}.
